zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Keith Marischal of Scotland於大約1212年出生在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安比時，他的父親Hervey de Keith, Marischal of Scotland27歲，母親Margaret de Douglas35歲。他於1236年之前與Margaret Comyn在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1270年在他的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Keith Marischal of Scotland于大约1212年出生在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安比时，他的父亲Hervey de Keith, Marischal of Scotland27岁，母亲Margaret de Douglas35岁。他于1236年之前与Margaret Comyn在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1270年在他的家乡享年59岁，埋葬在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Keith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the lands of Keith in East Lothian. The placename is derived from British Celtic cait- ‘wood’. In the 17th century numerous bearers of this name settled in Ulster.
German: nickname from Middle High German kīt ‘sprout, offspring’.

History: George Keith (c. 1638–1716), born at Peterhead, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, came to NJ in or before 1685. In 1689 he settled in Philadelphia, where he became headmaster of the school now called the William Penn Charter School. He came into sharp collision with the Quaker leaders in PA and formed a separatist party known as the Christian Quakers, popularly known as ‘Keithians’.

variants.name: Kight
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Kite  .

variants.name: Keath
meanings: Scottish and English (mainly Cambridgeshire): variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Kite
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English kete, kyte ‘kite’ (the bird of prey), perhaps a nickname for a rapacious person.
English: habitational name from one or more of the minor places with names deriving from Old English cȳte, cyte ‘cottage, hut, shed’, such as Kite Farm in Swalecliffe (Kent).

variants.name: Keeth
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Keitt
meanings: Possibly an altered form of German   Keith   2.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Keith Marischal of Scotland was born about 1212, in Humbie, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Hervey de Keith, Marischal of Scotland, was 27 and his mother, Margaret de Douglas, was 35. He married Margaret Comyn before 1236, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1270, in his hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in Humbie, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Keith Marischal of Scotland est né environ 1212, à Humbie, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hervey de Keith, Marischal of Scotland, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Douglas, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Comyn avant 1236, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1270, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Humbie, Haddingtonshire, Écosse.

de.Humbie, East Lothian, Scotland: Humbie, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John de Keith Marischal of Scotland um 1212 in Humbie, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hervey de Keith, Marischal of Scotland 27 und seine Mutter Margaret de Douglas 35. Er hat vor 1236 in Scotland Margaret Comyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1270 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Humbie, Haddingtonshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Keith Marischal of Scotland è nato il circa 1212 nel Humbie, East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Hervey de Keith, Marischal of Scotland, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Douglas, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Comyn prima del 1236, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1270, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Humbie, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Keith Marischal of Scotlandが約1212年にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンハンビで生まれた時，父Hervey de Keith, Marischal of Scotlandは27歳，母Margaret de Douglasは35歳であった。1236年以前にスコットランドでMargaret Comynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1270年に故郷で59歳で死去し，スコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアハンビにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Keith Marischal of Scotland(이)가 대략 1212년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 훔비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hervey de Keith, Marischal of Scotland(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Douglas(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1236년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Margaret Comyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1270년 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 훔비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Keith Marischal of Scotland nasceu aproximadamente 1212, em Humbie, East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hervey de Keith, Marischal of Scotland, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Douglas, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Comyn antes 1236, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1270, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Humbie, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Keith Marischal of Scotland родился около 1212 г. в местности хумби, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hervey de Keith, Marischal of Scotland было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Douglas, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Comyn перед 1236 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1270 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности хумби, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия.

Se casó con Margaret Comyn antes de 1236, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1270, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Humbie, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.
